title: Mobile Dental Care * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Mobile Dental Care * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full-time pediatric dentist, with access to local specialists for emergency referrals. Capable of managing comprehensive patient care in the clinic and coordinating referrals for specialized treatment. Operates a mobile medical and dental bus twice a month at various locations on the Warm Springs Reservation. Offers a range of pediatric specialty programs, including the Silver Nitrate Project for children ages 0–6 with active tooth decay. 1270 Kot-Num Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Members of a federally recognized American Indian or Alaskan Native tribe or children of tribal members only Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8am-7pm, Wednesday 1pm-7pm, Friday 8am-5pm. Mobile medical and dental bus locations and times vary. (541) 553-1196 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS DENTAL PROGRAM
